Uses of Package
com.example.getoutthere.organizer

Packages that use com.example.getoutthere.organizer
Package
Description
com.example.getoutthere.organizer
 
  • Classes in com.example.getoutthere.organizer used by com.example.getoutthere.organizer
    Class
    Description
    CancelledFragment
    Fragment displaying the list of entrants who have cancelled or declined an event invitation.
    EnrolledFragment
    Fragment displaying the list of entrants who have enrolled for an event.
    EntrantAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for displaying entrants in organizer fragments.
    EntrantAdapter.EntrantViewHolder
    ViewHolder for entrant items.
    EntrantAdapter.OnCancelClickListener
    Listener interface for cancel button click events on entrant rows.
    InvitedFragment
    Fragment displaying invited entrants for an event.
    OrganizerCreateEventActivity
    Allows organizers to create a new event.
    OrganizerCreateEventActivity.TimestampSelectionListener
    Listener interface used to return the Timestamp chosen in the date and time picker.
    OrganizerEditEventActivity
    Allows organizers to edit an existing event.
    OrganizerEditEventActivity.TimestampSelectionListener
    Listener interface used to return the Timestamp chosen in the date and time picker.
    OrganizerEventAdapter
    Represents the adapter that maps Event objects to their corresponding UI components for organizers.
    OrganizerEventDetailsActivity
    Activity for organizer to view details of a specific event.
    OrganizerEventListActivity
    Displays a list of Events created by the current user.
    WaitlistFragment
    Fragment displaying the waitlist for an event.
